title: Most Syrian refugees in Germany expected to return home in three years, Merz says
summary_full: Merz’s government has taken a tougher line on refugees and migrants, amid surging support for the anti-immigration AfD party.
summary_public: Merz’s government has taken a tougher line on refugees and migrants, amid surging support for the anti-immigration AfD party.
